PATIENT_ID: TEST_AKI_SUBTHRESHOLD_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-02-15 09:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-02-16 08:00:00
Patient with mild acute kidney injury during hospitalization.
Creatinine rose from 1.0 to 1.8 mg/dL (stage 1 AKI).
Renal function improving with IV fluids. No dialysis needed.

[LAB] 2026-02-16 06:00:00
Creatinine: 1.8 mg/dL (baseline 1.0)
BUN: 28 mg/dL
GFR: 42 mL/min

[PROGRESS_NOTE] 2026-02-17 10:00:00
AKI resolving. Creatinine trending down to 1.4.
Stage 1 AKI, below stage 3 threshold. No dialysis needed.
